meaning: adj.粘得讨厌的,过分甜的,讨厌的n.令人作呕的人
examples: Or is the icky-cleanup half worth more than the taking-my-order half?
Those icky sheets in a Guatemalan hotel room? Turns out that I didn’t have to touch them.
There was some icky couples counseling (" Try a blindfold ") and therapeutic spending on vacations, clothes, furniture.
The White Stripes covered her 1948 track "Conquest" on their 2007 album Icky Thump.
The icky sludge and saltcake generated from making weapons is nothing like fuel from a power reactor.
